treasury.text: Yea, mine own familiar friend, in whom I trusted, which did eat of my bread, hath lifted up his heel against me.

treasury.label: John 13:18
treasury.text: I speak not of you all: I know whom I have chosen: but that the scripture may be fulfilled, He that eateth bread with me hath lifted up his heel against me.

treasury.label: Isaiah 19:11-14
treasury.text: Surely the princes of Zoan are fools, the counsel of the wise counsellers of Pharaoh is become brutish: how say ye unto Pharaoh, I am the son of the wise, the son of ancient kings? …

treasury.label: Isaiah 27:11
treasury.text: When the boughs thereof are withered, they shall be broken off: the women come, and set them on fire: for it is a people of no understanding: therefore he that made them will not have mercy on them, and he that formed them will shew them no favour.

treasury.label: Jeremiah 49:7
treasury.text: Concerning Edom, thus saith the LORD of hosts; Is wisdom no more in Teman? is counsel perished from the prudent? is their wisdom vanished?

cross_references.label: Job 5:12
cross_references.text: He thwarts the schemes of the crafty, so that their hands find no success.

1:8.top_verse: In that day, declares the LORD, will I not destroy the wise men of Edom and the men of understanding in the mountains of Esau?

treasury.label: Job 5:12-14
treasury.text: He disappointeth the devices of the crafty, so that their hands cannot perform their enterprise…

treasury.label: Psalm 33:10
treasury.text: The LORD bringeth the counsel of the heathen to nought: he maketh the devices of the people of none effect.

treasury.label: Isaiah 19:3,13,14
treasury.text: And the spirit of Egypt shall fail in the midst thereof; and I will destroy the counsel thereof: and they shall seek to the idols, and to the charmers, and to them that have familiar spirits, and to the wizards…

cross_references.label: Genesis 36:11
cross_references.text: The sons of Eliphaz were Teman, Omar, Zepho, Gatam, and Kenaz.

cross_references.label: 1 Chronicles 1:45
cross_references.text: When Jobab died, Husham from the land of the Temanites reigned in his place.

cross_references.label: Job 2:11
cross_references.text: Now when Job's three friends--Eliphaz the Temanite, Bildad the Shuhite, and Zophar the Naamathite--heard about all this adversity that had come upon him, each of them came from his home, and they met together to go and sympathize with Job and comfort him.

cross_references.label: Isaiah 34:5
cross_references.text: When My sword has drunk its fill in the heavens, then it will come down upon Edom, upon the people I have devoted to destruction.

cross_references.label: Isaiah 63:1
cross_references.text: Who is this coming from Edom, from Bozrah with crimson-stained garments? Who is this robed in splendor, marching in the greatness of His strength? "It is I, proclaiming vindication, mighty to save."

cross_references.label: Jeremiah 49:7
cross_references.text: Concerning Edom, this is what the LORD of Hosts says: "Is there no longer wisdom in Teman? Has counsel perished from the prudent? Has their wisdom decayed?

cross_references.label: Jeremiah 49:22
cross_references.text: Look! An eagle will soar and swoop down, spreading its wings over Bozrah. In that day the hearts of Edom's mighty men will be like the heart of a woman in labor.

cross_references.label: Ezekiel 25:13
cross_references.text: therefore this is what the Lord GOD says: I will stretch out My hand against Edom and cut off from it both man and beast. I will make it a wasteland, and from Teman to Dedan they will fall by the sword.

cross_references.label: Amos 1:12
cross_references.text: So I will send fire upon Teman to consume the citadels of Bozrah."

cross_references.label: Obadiah 1:5
cross_references.text: "If thieves came to you, if robbers by night--oh, how you will be ruined--would they not steal only what they wanted? If grape gatherers came to you, would they not leave some gleanings?

1:9.top_verse: Then your mighty men, O Teman, will be terrified, so that everyone in the mountains of Esau will be cut down in the slaughter.

treasury.label: Psalm 76:5,6
treasury.text: The stouthearted are spoiled, they have slept their sleep: and none of the men of might have found their hands…

treasury.label: Isaiah 19:16,17
treasury.text: In that day shall Egypt be like unto women: and it shall be afraid and fear because of the shaking of the hand of the LORD of hosts, which he shaketh over it…

treasury.label: Jeremiah 49:22
treasury.text: Behold, he shall come up and fly as the eagle, and spread his wings over Bozrah: and at that day shall the heart of the mighty men of Edom be as the heart of a woman in her pangs.

treasury.label: Genesis 36:11
treasury.text: And the sons of Eliphaz were Teman, Omar, Zepho, and Gatam, and Kenaz.

treasury.label: Job 2:11
treasury.text: Now when Job's three friends heard of all this evil that was come upon him, they came every one from his own place; Eliphaz the Temanite, and Bildad the Shuhite, and Zophar the Naamathite: for they had made an appointment together to come to mourn with him and to comfort him.

treasury.label: Jeremiah 49:7,20
treasury.text: Concerning Edom, thus saith the LORD of hosts; Is wisdom no more in Teman? is counsel perished from the prudent? is their wisdom vanished? …

treasury.label: Isaiah 34:5-8
treasury.text: For my sword shall be bathed in heaven: behold, it shall come down upon Idumea, and upon the people of my curse, to judgment…

treasury.label: Isaiah 63:1-3
treasury.text: Who is this that cometh from Edom, with dyed garments from Bozrah? this that is glorious in his apparel, travelling in the greatness of his strength? I that speak in righteousness, mighty to save…

treasury.label: Obadiah 1:21
treasury.text: And saviours shall come up on mount Zion to judge the mount of Esau; and the kingdom shall be the LORD'S.

treasury.label: Deuteronomy 2:5
treasury.text: Meddle not with them; for I will not give you of their land, no, not so much as a foot breadth; because I have given mount Seir unto Esau for a possession.
